summary: Iteration 50 testing complete. All requested features verified: PickCard crash fix in Tracking tab, cartoon ball icons (no smiley faces), cartoon theme with green-glowing borders, Nunito font, and bouncy animations. All navigation works, no JavaScript console errors.

VERIFIED: CartoonSoccer SVG in Header.jsx (lines 4-18) - regular soccer ball with pentagon patterns, NO smiley face

VERIFIED: Sport toggle works correctly - Soccer and Basketball buttons toggle active state
VERIFIED: Bottom nav active state shows green-tinted background pill (rgba(16,185,129,0.08) background)
VERIFIED: Tab switcher (Live/Won/Lost/Pushed) shows active state with green glow effect
VERIFIED: Login page inputs have green-tinted borders (rgba(16,185,129,0.12) border, green box-shadow on focus)
VERIFIED: VERIFY ACCESS button has green background (rgb(16,185,129))
VERIFIED: Nunito font used throughout (index.css line 1, App.css multiple references)
VERIFIED: CSS variables include --card-glow and --border-primary as green-tinted (index.css lines 10-11, 30-31)
VERIFIED: All tracking sub-tabs (Live, Won, Lost, Pushed) render without errors
VERIFIED: Profile tab renders correctly with subscription section
VERIFIED: No JavaScript console errors on any page
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 50 verified the cartoon theme overhaul and PickCard bug fix. Key points: (1) PickCard component was re-added to TrackingTab.jsx after being deleted during a refactor - it's now fully functional. (2) CartoonSoccer and CartoonBasketball SVG components in Header.jsx render regular ball icons with no smiley faces - soccer ball has pentagon patterns, basketball has seam lines. (3) Cartoon theme uses green-tinted borders (rgba(16,185,129,...)), Nunito font, and glowing box-shadows throughout. (4) Bottom nav active state has filled pill-shaped background with green tint. (5) All navigation works correctly between Scan, Tracking, and Profile tabs. (6) No JavaScript console errors detected.
